title: (Junior) Analyst – E-Commerce Rankings & Marketing (m/f/d)
required_skills: Completed studies in economics / business administration / marketing (Bachelor/Master)
Strong interest in e-commerce markets, digital platforms, online business models
First practical experience in marketing, outreach, or campaign management
Excel and PowerPoint — very good proficiency
bonus_skills: Email campaigns, mass mailings, direct company outreach
Data tools or programming (Python, R, SQL)
matched_skills: E-commerce funnel and audience analytics (Moli Media: live-stream e-commerce 4,000+ attendees, revenue attribution)
Campaign performance tracking with structured reporting (IPC: 4 B2B campaigns, ROI; GRG: pipeline conversion)
Market analysis and competitive benchmarking (ECE: automotive/furniture competitor analysis; GRG: EMEA/APAC)
Data-driven analysis and structured insight delivery
missing_skills: Email campaign / mass mailing / direct outreach execution experience (soft gap — Boru is analytics-focused, not outreach-focused)
Hamburg location (Boru is in Lüneburg — 50 min commute or need to relocate)
core_responsibilities: Contribute to international media cooperation projects and company rankings
Analyse e-commerce companies: business models, performance metrics
Research and analyse primary/secondary data for rankings development
Support creation of international marketing campaigns in rankings environment
Plan and execute company outreach campaigns (email campaigns)
culture_keywords: Statista (world's leading business data platform, Hamburg)
recommended_emphasis: Moli Media: e-commerce funnel analytics (4,000+ attendees, revenue attribution) → strongest differentiator for e-commerce interest
GRG + IPC: multi-market competitive and campaign analysis → 'research and analyse company performance metrics'
ECE: competitive benchmarking frameworks → 'develop rankings and assessments'
English C1 + Chinese C2 — multi-language asset for international media projects
Position as analyst who can both research AND quantify impact

company_info.size_raw: Statista — world's leading business data platform, Hamburg (founded 2007)
